news.title: Amazon Won't Release Sam Altman Film 'Artificial' Following $50 Billion OpenAI Investment
news.summary: Amazon is pulling out of "Artificial," a film about Sam Altman's brief ouster from OpenAI, not long after investing $50 billion in the firm.
